DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT GINA SPONZILLI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Proper cause of action for constructive eviction stated. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: B. Paredes, Not reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT GINA SPONZILLI's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT IS DENIED. Effect of provision of lease limiting use to "use for residential purposes" not dispositive as a matter of law. Motion to strike punitive damages DENIED because there is claim for constructive eviction. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: B. Paredes, Not reported (D501)
